message:
fix: set window-size largest globally and on all sessions at startup (#88)

Sets tmux global window-size to largest in TerminalManager constructor,
and forces window-size largest on every existing tmux session during
reAdoptOrphanedSessions. This prevents copilot CLI from overriding the
setting with 'manual' which causes dots in desktop terminals.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
